ip_intent.one_line_desc: Low-power controller for a dual-channel ADC with filtering and debouncing capability
ip_intent.one_paragraph_desc:
Analog to Digital Converter (ADC) Controller provides a simple front-end to an analog block that allows filtering and debouncing of the sampled data.
ADC Controller supports 2 ADC channels and 8 filters on the values from the channels.
It has debounce timers on the filter output and supports ADCs with 10-bit output.
To enable usage while the device is sleeping, it runs on a slow always-on clock.
In addition, it has a low power periodic scan mode for monitoring ADC channels.

interrupts.name: match_pending
interrupts.desc: ADC match or measurement event has occurred

alerts.name: fatal_fault
alerts.desc: This fatal alert is triggered when a fatal TL-UL bus integrity fault is detected.

fields.name: adc_enable
fields.desc: 1'b0: to power down ADC and ADC_CTRL FSM will enter the reset state; 1'b1: to power up ADC and ADC_CTRL FSM will start

fields.name: oneshot_mode
fields.desc: Oneshot mode does not care about the filter value. 1'b0: disable; 1'b1: enable

fields.name: lp_mode
fields.desc: 1'b0: adc_pd is disabled, use adc_sample_ctl. 1'b1: adc_pd is enabled, use both adc_lp_sample_ctl & adc_sample_ctl

fields.name: pwrup_time
fields.desc:
ADC power up time, measured in always on clock cycles.
After power up time is reached, the ADC controller needs one additional cycle before an ADC channel is selected for access.

fields.name: wakeup_time
fields.desc: How often FSM wakes up from ADC PD mode to take a sample, measured in always on clock cycles.

fields.name: lp_sample_cnt
fields.desc:
The number of samples in low-power mode when the low-power mode is enabled.
After the programmed number is met, ADC won't be powered down any more.
This value must be 1 or larger.

fields.name: np_sample_cnt
fields.desc:
The number of samples in normal-power mode to meet the debounce spec.
Used after the low-power mode condition is met or in the normal power mode.
This value must be 1 or larger.

fields.name: rst_en
fields.desc: 1'b0: Normal functional mode. 1'b1: SW to reset all the FSMs and timers

fields.name: MATCH_EN
TRANS_EN
fields.desc:
Wakeup due to FSM transition from low power sampling
mode to normal sampling mode.

Note that this wakeup source is primarily intended for debug purposes.
If enabled all the time, this can lead to many wakeups due to false
positives that are ruled out automatically by adc_ctrl after
transitioning from LP -> NP.

0: transition match will not generate wakeup;
1: transition match will generate wakeup

registers.name: filter_status
registers.desc:
Adc filter match status

Indicates whether a particular filter has matched on all channels.

fields.name: MATCH
fields.desc: 0: filter condition is not met; 1: filter condition is met

fields.name: TRANS
fields.desc: 0: transition did not occur; 1: transition occurred

registers.name: adc_intr_ctl
registers.desc:
Interrupt enable controls.

adc_ctrl sends out only 1 interrupt, so this register controls
which internal sources are actually registered.

This register uses the same bit enumeration as !!ADC_INTR_STATUS

fields.name: MATCH_EN
fields.desc:
Filter interrupt source.

0: interrupt source is not enabled; 1: interrupt source is enabled

fields.name: TRANS_EN
fields.desc:
Interrupt due to FSM transition from low power sampling
mode to normal sampling mode. This is mainly intended for debug.

Note that this interrupt is primarily intended for debug purposes.

0: interrupt source is not enabled; 1: interrupt source is enabled

fields.name: ONESHOT_EN
fields.desc:
Interrupt due to oneshot sampling.

0: interrupt source is not enabled; 1: interrupt source is enabled

fields.name: MATCH
fields.desc: 0: filter condition is not met; 1: filter condition is met

fields.name: TRANS
fields.desc: 0: transition did not occur; 1: transition occurred

fields.name: ONESHOT
fields.desc: 0: oneshot sample is not done ; 1: oneshot sample is done

registers.name: adc_fsm_state
registers.desc: State of the internal state machine
